name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci's name embellish leather accessories, blending modern small leather goods with Gucci's deep design heritage. The textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant light beige mini shoulder bag. Light beige GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: one leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high), magnetic closure.
name_cn:
💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】GG Extra Mini Shoulder Bag. The initials of founder Guccio Gucci's name embellish leather accessories, blending modern small leather goods with Gucci's deep design heritage. The textured and glossy classic GG pattern adds a unique touch to this elegant light beige mini shoulder bag. Light beige GG leather, cotton-linen blend lining, inside: one leather open pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (50cm high), magnetic closure.
Model: 772794.
Dimensions: 13.5(L) x 21(W) x 3cm(H)
Color: Light Beige/Pressed Original Leather.
Weight: approx. 0.34kg
Made in Italy
Fits iPhone Pro Max/Plus, small wallet, and lipstick
